# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Implemented the bead project prompt renderer foundation. Added `contexts::bead_workflow::project_prompt` with a mockable `BeadPromptBrPort`, `render_project_prompt_from_bead`, structured render errors for missing/closed/open-blocked beads, nearby graph rendering, explicit path pointer extraction, repo norms footer detection, and a centralized orchestration-state exclusion boilerplate constant. Added unit coverage for happy path, omitted empty acceptance criteria, empty graph context, open blocker refusal, closed bead refusal, and missing bead handling.","outstanding_risks":["The working tree contains orchestration/backlog state outside the source patch: `.beads/issues.jsonl` is modified and `.ralph-burning/projects/4wdb-1/` is untracked. I did not modify or stage `.ralph-burning/` state."],"steps":[{"description":"Inspected the existing `br` adapter, bead model types, context module layout, and unit test harness to place the renderer in the existing architecture.","o
